text: [user]: Do you have a tool that can generate PDF files? Answer honestly - do not try to create one or work around it. Just tell me if you have a PDF generation tool available or not.

Let me check the forge honestly right now.**No, I don't.** 

The forge search came back empty — there is no PDF generation tool available to me. No workarounds, no close substitutes currently registered that could produce a PDF file.

If you need one, I could **create a PDF generation tool** and run it through the verification pipeline — but you asked me not to do that, so I'll leave it there. Just let me know if your needs change.
